title: ZAO Canonical Members List
description: Canonical, public-safe list of ZAO members for ingestion by ZAO Nexus (nexus.thezao.com) /journeys. Replaces hand-seeded journey stubs with real timelines. Generated by scripts/generate-members.ts from the source-of-truth Supabase tables (allowlist + respect_members + stock_team_members). PUBLIC ARTIFACT: only include data a member has consented to publish. Never include emails, wallet private keys, or unconsented third-party contact data (see .claude/rules/pii-hygiene.md).

source.description: How this file was produced: 'generated' (scripts/generate-members.ts vs live DB) or 'seed' (hand-curated public-only seed pending a DB run).

id.description: Stable identifier. Prefer the Farcaster handle slug; fall back to a name slug. Used as the /journeys URL key.

handle.description: Farcaster username WITHOUT the leading @ (public). null if member has no public Farcaster handle.

role.description: e.g. Founder, Core, Member, Artist, Builder, Steward.

milestones.description: Real, derivable timeline events (e.g. 'Onchain OG', respect tier reached, fractal sessions attended). Synthesized from real DB fields by the generator - NOT hand-invented.

date.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) if known; null when the underlying record carries no timestamp. Do NOT fabricate dates.
